name: project-setup
description: Architectural decision-maker for repos — new and existing. Structural decisions organised in a four-level altitude model (ecosystem / repo / app / feature) with named variants and checkable tripwires. Triggers when the user makes any layout, structural, or convention decision: where a file or folder belongs, monorepo vs polyrepo, adding or splitting services, apps/ grouping topology, admin/user identity planes, picking a database or ML orchestrator, docker / compose layout, env-config split, secrets, root hygiene / gitignore, design tokens, intra-app structure, modularity, mobile / desktop targets. Not only bootstrap — equally for restructuring established repos. One slash command (/ps-setup) with init | audit | suggest modes. Composes with sibling `dstack` and `documentation-guide` skills, and declares the sibling `uvenv` skill as a dependency (auto-installed) for the ML / named-global Python path.
